title: Instrument d'adhésion de la Nouvelle-Zélande
text_preview: WHEREAS the Convention concerning the Creation of an International Office of Weights and Measures (hereinafter referred to as "the Convention") was done at Paris on 20 May 1875, and was amended at Sevres on 6 October 1921; AND WHEREAS any State may adhere to the Convention; AND WHEREAS pursuant to Article 3 of the 1921 Convention, any adhesions to the Convention shall automatically entail adherence to the 1921 Conve…
